review_title: Excellent product with super responsive support
description: I buy a lot of SaaS tools, and I mean a lot. I have been very impressed with the support from the Meet Volley team. They deal with support requests quickly instead of letting it it sit in the inbox. I wish them success.
author: Ryan N.
pros: The beauty of MeetVolley is that it works, and it works really well. However, what sets it apart is the simple UI, clean design and most importantly [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and the team are very fast on support and try and accommodate you where possible.
cons: I genuinely don't have any negative thing to say about this product. I hope they add more integrations in the future, but that's not really a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best collaborative software for webdesigners I have seen!
description: Volley takes my WordPress website design business and maintenance services to a whole new level of professionality.
author: Ben A.
pros: Volley makes it extremely easy to take a screenshot of something on the internet and leave a comment for discussion. It can be an issue on a site I'm developing for a customer, an issue after website updates for my care plan customers or something a customer likes on another site that they would like implemented on theirs. And the best thing is that Volley is just getting better and better with more features. The authors are super easy to reach out to and the public roadmap is really worked on and you can leave suggestions there.
cons: It can be a little bit difficult for users to start using the first time and also everything is in English and not translated to Swedish.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Useful tool annotating websites with quick back and forth team feedback
description: With Volley, we found an easy way to write on top of the webpages and accelerate feedback between developers, clients, and designers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Volley is useful for marking up websites to give quick feedback on design, UI, site navigation, and functionality, all with the best visual cue that is annotating over the real product.
cons: I was reluctant to try Volley at first because when my development partner pointed me to their home page and what I saw put me instantly away from trying it, an ugly designed site with super cluttered home page using terrible fonts. I thought if this is the way they present themselves, and if the site is so badly designed, why would the product design be better. So, after his reiterative insistence, I agreed in trying it and must say we are finding it useful.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Really good, there are a few client feedback tools in the space and really Volley is the simplest to use. I'm happy with Volley as is, and with forthcoming developments I expect it to become an ever more capable tool.
author: Ben O.
pros: Simple solution to getting in browser feedback from clients on webdesign, UX and UI
cons: Currently, the app uses a chrome extension, this creates a point of friction/resistance for users. Volley are working on a completely browser-based "widget" to solve this issue. At which stage Volley will be even more awesome.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: So easy and so much more efficient!
description: So we made the decision to try Volley after struggling with an inefficient workflow for review and critique, as well as client design requests. We implemented this tool into our workflow and it has made life so much easier. We now use it for every project!
author: Travis P.
pros: This has made our workflow for design review and client change requests a breeze! We are no longer bogged down by emails that are wordy and yet still do not paint the proper picture of a change. This allows a very precise way for the client or reviewer to take a snapshot of the area and mark it up with feedback.
cons: The only thing I think that may be an issue for certain clients is the chrome requirement, but otherwise I love it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good UI/UX, missing a few features
description: I think the process with volley could still be improved, but the software overall is nice
author: Andrey K.
pros: The UI/UX is very good and pleasant to use.
cons: Missing the feature to organize and easily share results (send links)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great software but doesn't stand out too much from other solutions (Zeplin, Invision and evrybo)
description: Definitely good, but nothing that stood out from other software. I have seen a very very startup company who offered a similar collaboration tool who had inbuilt ability to 'send for sign off' from the client and get client to check boxes to approve content, design and responsive. The company who did this (Share With Clients) is unfortunately not able to keep up with my other needs - the ability to tab between screens and Flexi width + height. However this element felt like it had massive potential
author: Amy H.
pros: I like being able to mark comments as resolved - as a designer this is crucial when you have a list of 100 tasks on design boards to run through. The ability to attach images in comments isn't something I've seen before and was what really persuaded me to try out the software
cons: The draw functionality - not sure it's needed. I think the ability to reply to comments with mockups is great and is more a priority. I've really enjoyed using this during the trial however couldn't justify the price.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Lucia U.
pros: I love using Volley as a collaboration tool with front-end engineers and UI/UX developers at my organization. Our product is very robust and enterprise, and Volley allows me to identify areas in our platform that need fixing, and screenshots the browser window letting my developers know exactly where they can find the issue. It creates a great backlog of design items they can get to when they have time. It's also very beneficial when we're working on building a feature, as a way to capture design QA.
cons: My only complaint is that I feel like I have to continually sign in because it keeps logging me out.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Simple to use and does exactly what it's supposed to!
author: Tom D.
pros: Volley has made our website feedback and revision requests much simpler. It's incredibly easy to use and has a clean and simple UI which adds to that easy to use feeling. The first client we had utilize it, I wasn't sure how it was going to go but he even called (unprompted) to comment how Volley was a "cool little tool" and made his feedback much simpler.
cons: They're a growing company, so some features are still in the works. While it was easy for clients to use, they still had to create an account and install a Chrome extension. They also now receive emails from Volley such as feature updates, etc. which is a little frustrating as most of these are one-time users. This should be getting resolved soon though as I believe white-label is on the way at the time of this rev iew.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must-have tool for every web designer
author: adrian W.
pros: Volley is easier to use, faster and more stable than other software I have used.
cons: On-boarding instructions for clients could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Serita G.
pros: Volly makes it extremely easy to monitor and request specific feedback virtually.
cons: I'd love if in the future I could use this product for video content reviews. It would indeed be a game-changer .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Some customers communicate with a lot of emails without any structure. With Volley it's more structured and also easy for customer to see the status of open items.
author: Herman K.
pros: I before used MarkUp, but that is quit slow and often it didn't work nice.
cons: Login when using a passwordmanager in your browser it will show the password of the website you are working on instead of the password of Volley.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The software does exactly what it purports to do. It doesn't have any unnecessary features that bog down the product. It has changed the way I manage the deployment of websites.
author: John W.
pros: I like that I can clearly understand changes from my clients and track the completion of those changes.
cons: I wish there were a way in Volley to organize comments and changes by URL.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Worked great for setting up my website
author: Anthony C.
pros: My employees could communicate about the changes they needed to make easily and quickly.
cons: There were too many email notifications.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best design review tool I've used
description: Really positive, I've been enjoying using it. I look forward to the new versions and features of this software.
author: Jozsef S.
pros: Reviewing live sites and apps has been a challenging task but with Volley, we've been able to simplify the process and give direct and accurate feedback to our developers.
cons: Reviewing mobile websites (device emulation in Chrome) on a desktop device is a bit cumbersome due to the positioning of the popup overlay. I wish there was a basic shape draw tool (along with the hand draw tool) to be able to hand off more precise review documents. Also, the ability to create groups/folders of projects would make our dashboard more organized and easy to follow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Vanessa G.
pros: I liked that I was able to make edits directly on the webpage. Before I used to have to make PDFs of a page and make edits there, which was very time-consuming.
cons: I didn't like that you couldn't go to a page and see all the sticky notes at one time. Navigating through the list on Volley is a bit confusing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kagan O.
pros: I have used it and this perfect. Maybe again you can sell it from appsumo:) My friends wants to buy it.
cons: Nothing. But you can make it a little bit cheaper:)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nicole C.
pros: I love how easy Volley is to use. Our team is easily able to convey website edits that are needed to the development team. We were previously using Google Sheets to track edits and added screenshots, but with Volley it makes it so much easier to list and point out changes needed.
cons: I cannot think of anything that I don't like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My new go-to tool for feedback
description: I've enjoyed my experience and the support that Volley provides. I really hope this company continues to do great things with this product.
author: Ryan J.
pros: The ease of use and the amount of time that this software saves me is incredible. We use the tool for both internal and external feedback on websites. What used to take 30 minutes can now be done in five.
cons: My Chrome extension was a bit glitchy at first, but it's all good now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Aman G.
pros: I think it solves one of the key problems faced in the website development industry. it is very simple to use.
cons: I think it is still in very nascent stage so missing few features which can be helpful. I think it will evolve with time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Katelyn T.
pros: I am a very visual person, so having a client be able to pinpoint exactly where they want a change to a web design is very helpful.
cons: None that i have found so far! But I am not the user that implemented this product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jagadeesh C.
pros: We can take the screenshots of any website to get feedback.
cons: Moderators can delete users or admins comments. Which is not a good option. We I'll miss the transparency. Suggestions: Adding a Rating and Voting option is good to analyse the feedback. Adding the analytics option can help to show the feedback reports to clients. Recommending white label PDF reports. Now other feedback tools are adding these options. So, you guys please consider these things I mentioned.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It makes it easy to communicate with my web designer about changes to my site.
author: Thora S.
pros: I like that I can specify precisely where on a page that a change should be made.
cons: It sometimes does not acknowledge me and I have to uninstall and reinstall it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Our project management becomes way too easier when we started using Volley.
description: We used volley for our developer team and it works like a charm for them when it comes to deal with the feedbacks of clients, previously the software manager use to be the bridge of communication between developer team and clients now volley is doing it amazing, it also helped us to collaborate on the project and making screenshots and resolving issues, it was a good experience using volley.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the best advantages of using volley is that now clients can provide their feedback while our developer team is working on a project, Now clients can see their website and write what changes they need into particular section and provide their feedback, which is best for the project completion and also it helps us to further wasting time while making changes after the work is done. volley can be integrated to trello which makes us best for our team to work. we can also collaborate using volley.
cons: There is no cons of using volley for me as based on my experience this programs is easy and comes with lots of features but we will expect more if they provide. overall not faced any issue while using volley.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: my way of working with this application is that I create a project for each website of my clients. and I add my clients as collaborators of only that project. Therefore, from the chrome extension, only the project that was given permission appears. This is an incredibly fast and efficient way for my clients to request changes to their websites.
author: Edison P.
pros: I like that it has just enough for my clients to send their website comments and corrections, and that someone on my team can review it. it is simple, with private spaces and does not need a learning curve.
cons: Before, the con was that they did not have notifications when users made notes, therefore I did not know if news from my users had arrived. This was corrected a few months ago, so he no longer has points against. they fixed their faults quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
